data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Work landed on main in commit d5733dbc9 (rebar-ticket: 5e40, reachable from origin/main): added drift_floor.py (Pass-3 code-drift floor), decide.drift_floor_drop, the plan-review-novelty behavioural eval, and test_plan_review_drift_floor.py — exactly this residual's scope. Stayed open only because the commit was trailed to parent 5e40, not 0916. Operator (Joe Oakhart) confirmed completing this change. Force-closing.". Session: 42587558-4191-4a14-bbfd-728d8d0007b7.
